en_title: New Details Revealed on Whore of the Orient, LA Noire's Canceled Spiritual Successor
cn_title: 《Whore of the Orient》新细节曝光：被取消的《黑色洛城》精神续作
subtitle: 上海背景侦探游戏未竟之梦
opus_summary: 前编剧披露被取消的《黑色洛城》精神续作《Whore of the Orient》细节：故事设于1930年代上海，主打犯罪预防、语言成长、分支审讯和更丰富近战，取消时完成度约15%。

paragraphs.en: New details about Whore of the Orient , the canceled spiritual successor to LA Noire, have been revealed by a former writer on the project.
paragraphs.cn: 该项目一名前编剧披露了《Whore of the Orient》的新细节，这款被取消的游戏原本是《黑色洛城》的精神续作。

paragraphs.en: I recently sat down with Daniel McMahon, a writer who worked on LA Noire for a YouTube video celebrating the game's recent 15th anniversary. In the second half of the video, we dove deep on Whore of the Orient, a controversial game that would've served as a spiritual successor to LA Noire. The game was in the works at Kennedy Miller-Mitchell, the production company of the Mad Max films, and was being worked on by ex-Team Bondi staff, including LA Noire writer and director Brendan McNamara.
paragraphs.cn: 为制作庆祝《黑色洛城》15周年的YouTube视频，我最近与参与该作的编剧Daniel McMahon坐下来交流。视频后半部分深入讨论了颇具争议、原计划作为《黑色洛城》精神续作的《Whore of the Orient》。游戏由《疯狂的麦克斯》电影制作公司Kennedy Miller-Mitchell开发，参与者包括《黑色洛城》编剧兼导演Brendan McNamara等前Team Bondi员工。

paragraphs.en: It would've been yet another historical crime story, but this time set in Shanghai in the 1930s. McMahon stated that the game would've been more dense than LA Noire, opting to focus on more detail rather than overwhelming scale. He compared it to the shift between Assassin's Creed 4: Black Flag and Assassin's Creed Unity, which traded the open seas for a crowded version of Paris.
paragraphs.cn: 这原本又是一段历史犯罪故事，但背景设在1930年代上海。McMahon表示，游戏会比《黑色洛城》更加紧凑，重点是更丰富的细节而非庞大规模。他将其比作《刺客信条4：黑旗》到《刺客信条：大革命》的变化：从开放海洋转向拥挤的巴黎。

paragraphs.en: Players would've filled the shoes of a British detective in Shanghai, but Whore of the Orient would've taken a different approach to crime fighting than LA Noire. In LA Noire, players would solve murders and mysteries, meaning the crime had already happened. In Whore of the Orient, the goal was that you would work to prevent crimes before they happened and patrol the city to stop crimes.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家原本将扮演上海的一名英国侦探，但《Whore of the Orient》打击犯罪的方式不同于《黑色洛城》。在《黑色洛城》中，玩家调查谋杀和谜案，意味着犯罪已经发生；新作的目标则是在犯罪发生前加以预防，并巡逻城市制止犯罪。

paragraphs.en: Of course, as a British detective in a non-English speaking city, there would've been unique challenges. The team was developing concepts of a language system that would level up with XP as you progressed through the game, allowing you to speak and interact with more people. Similarly, an evolved version of LA Noire's conversation system would've also been featured, adding more branching paths to the game.
paragraphs.cn: 作为身处非英语城市的英国侦探，玩家自然会面临独特挑战。团队曾构思一种语言系统，随着游戏推进通过经验值升级，让玩家能与更多人交谈互动。游戏还计划采用《黑色洛城》对话系统的进化版本，加入更多分支路线。

paragraphs.en: In LA Noire, the player could interview or interrogate people over the facts of a case. The player had to then study the facial expressions of the interviewee to detect whether they were telling the truth, withholding information, or outright lying. There was only one right answer, but Whore of the Orient would've had a more dynamic approach.
paragraphs.cn: 在《黑色洛城》中，玩家可以围绕案件事实询问或审讯相关人员，随后观察对方表情，判断其是在说实话、隐瞒信息还是彻底撒谎。游戏只有一个正确答案，而《Whore of the Orient》原本会采用更动态的方式。

paragraphs.en: If the player felt someone was lying, they could choose whether to bully the information out of them or they could try a gentle approach. It allowed players to choose the kind of cop they wanted to be and roleplay, but it also meant that they might get different answers or outcomes based on their approach. There was no "right" answer in WOTO's interrogations, but there would be answers that would be more helpful than others.
paragraphs.cn: 如果玩家觉得某人在撒谎，可以选择以威逼方式套出信息，也可以采取温和手段。这让玩家能选择自己想成为哪种警察并进行角色扮演，也意味着不同做法可能获得不同答案或结果。《Whore of the Orient》的审讯没有「正确」答案，但有些答案会比其他答案更有帮助。

paragraphs.en: "If you hit the suspect just right, you would get the entire truth revealed to you," said McMahon. "If you tried strategies in the middle, you might get an address or a name, and then you would have to go find more suspects and put more information together with."
paragraphs.cn: McMahon说：「如果你恰到好处地击打嫌疑人，他就会把全部真相告诉你。如果采取介于两者之间的策略，可能只得到一个地址或姓名，之后还得寻找更多嫌疑人，把更多信息拼凑起来。」

paragraphs.en: Whore of the Orient was also exploring a more engaging combat system, with the team taking inspiration from the rhytmic combat of the Batman: Arkham series for the hand-to-hand action. Of course, there would've been gunplay as well, but there was a lot of extra attention being paid to the melee combat.
paragraphs.cn: 《Whore of the Orient》也在探索更有吸引力的战斗系统，团队从以《新蝙蝠侠》角色为核心的《蝙蝠侠：阿卡姆》系列富有节奏感的战斗中汲取近身格斗灵感。游戏当然也会有枪战，但开发者对近战投入了大量额外关注。

paragraphs.en: Ultimately, Whore of the Orient was canceled due to funding and publisher issues. McMahon estimated that the game was only 15% done when it was scrapped and they had a lot of work left to do. A lot of the ideas were just that: ideas. He noted that he wasn't sure all of them would've panned out and they had to nail down a lot of specifics, but it still seemed like a really exciting concept and one that would've helped expand the detective genre in gaming.
paragraphs.cn: 最终，《Whore of the Orient》因资金和发行商问题被取消。McMahon估计项目被砍时只完成约15%，还有大量工作未做。许多构想仅停留在想法阶段。他指出，自己不确定所有想法能否成功，团队也需要敲定许多细节，但这仍是一个令人兴奋的概念，本可帮助拓展游戏中的侦探类型。
